modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Document stuck in Working status, batch error message received.

full_description_text: User is trying to leave the batch. But it is not working. The document is stuck in Working status. Error says batch is waiting for processing by batch agent.
short_description: Document stuck in Working status, batch error message received.
description: User is trying to leave the batch. But it is not working. The document is stuck in Working status. Error says batch is waiting for processing by batch agent.
